Bouncy Castle Rentals in Sydney NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, not Sydney. We can quote selected larger Sydney bouncy castle rentals and inflatable rentals by availability, travel distance, staffing requirements, and setup needs. Travel quoted separately.

Sydney bookings are reviewed case by case for event size, travel distance, staffing needs, setup suitability, and availability before confirmation. We do not operate a local Sydney branch.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Quest - Obstacle Course, $240, Dry-use - Obstacle course attraction for bigger event energy.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.

Best For

  • Larger events
  • Schools
  • Festivals
  • Custom packages

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you guarantee delivery to Sydney?
No. Nova Kingdom Rentals can quote select Sydney events by availability, travel distance, staffing, and setup requirements.
